$comment: Shared, committed Claude Code config for this project. Safe, high-frequency dev-loop commands are pre-approved so every worktree inherits them (per-checkout, ad-hoc grants still go to the gitignored settings.local.json). Network-binding commands (uvicorn) are intentionally NOT allow-listed — they should prompt. The hooks emit non-blocking reminders to keep docs/SCHEMA.md and config.example.toml in sync after edits. See AGENTS.md.

hooks.command: p=$(cat); case "$p" in *app/db.py*) printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: schema changed — keep docs/SCHEMA.md in sync with app/db.py (AGENTS.md)."}}';; *app/config.py*) printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: tunable changed — update config.example.toml (guarded by tests/test_config.py)."}}';; *) :;; esac
